description_long: This object is a stylized doll face mask with a smooth, glossy white surface and large, round eye holes. The mask features painted facial details, including pink and red curved designs around the eyes, a small black teardrop under the right eye, and full, red lips. The cheeks are subtly rounded, giving the face a childlike, doll-like appearance. The mask is hollow at the back, indicating it is designed to be worn or displayed as a faceplate. The surface is highly reflective, suggesting a hard plastic or porcelain material. There are no visible fastenings or attachments, and the mask is devoid of hair, clothing, or additional accessories.
description: A glossy white doll face mask with painted pink and red eye designs, a black teardrop, and red lips, featuring large eye holes and a smooth, rounded surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, painted details, large eye holes, and red lips.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the mask's depth, rounded cheeks, and hollow interior.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view emphasizing the curvature of the face and the prominence of the lips and nose.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the mask and the hollow back.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the object is a bare doll face mask with painted decorative elements.
attribute_pose: No body or limbs present; only the face is depicted, with a neutral, forward-facing orientation.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with slightly pursed red lips, wide open eye holes, and no visible eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: No hair present; the mask is bald.
